title: Align Tracks, Items, and Individual Cells on Correct Axes
summary: Build and verify grid alignment in field manual card and track alignment diagnosis through prediction, inspection, explanation, cumulative code, and changed-case transfer.
objectives: Explain grid alignment from purpose, behavior, and evidence.
Apply grid alignment without discarding earlier valid work.
Diagnose the named misconception in changed content, input, and failure states.

steps.title: 05 · Read the field manual card and track alignment diagnosis case · theory
steps.instruction: Checkpoint 5: Which claim preserves grid alignment when data, input, and layout change? Scenario: field manual card and track alignment diagnosis.
steps.why: Align Tracks, Items, and Individual Cells on Correct Axes makes the decision observable and testable. This is checkpoint 5 in field manual card and track alignment diagnosis.

content.text: Justify-content and align-content distribute the grid tracks inside extra container space. Justify-items and align-items set default alignment inside each grid area, while justify-self and align-self override one item. Place shorthand combines axes. Stretch is common, baseline can align text, and safe alignment avoids moving content where it becomes unreachable. Logical inline and block axes change with writing mode. Apply it to field manual card and track alignment diagnosis.
